metrics.label: Keys Examined
metrics.description: Total number of index entries scanned during the operation.

metrics.label: Docs Examined
metrics.description: Total number of documents scanned from disk/cache.

metrics.label: Docs Returned
metrics.description: Number of documents returned to the client.

metrics.label: Total Returned Units
metrics.description: Units of data returned (often mapped from nreturned).

metrics.label: Storage Effort
metrics.description: Total physical storage latency. Sum of disk reads, writes, and cache pressure stalls. Signal: Disk I/O saturation.

metrics.label: Result Size (Bytes)
metrics.description: Total size of the result set in bytes.

metrics.label: Docs Inserted
metrics.description: Number of documents inserted.

metrics.label: Keys Inserted
metrics.description: Number of index entries created.

metrics.label: Docs Modified
metrics.description: Number of existing documents modified.

metrics.label: Keys Updated
metrics.description: Number of index entries updated.

metrics.label: Docs Deleted
metrics.description: Number of documents removed.

metrics.label: Keys Deleted
metrics.description: Number of index entries removed.

metrics.label: Docs Upserted
metrics.description: Number of documents created via upsert.

metrics.label: Docs Matched
metrics.description: Number of documents that matched the update criteria but were not necessarily modified.

metrics.label: Cache Dirty (Bytes)
metrics.description: Amount of data modified in cache that requires a sweep to disk.

metrics.label: Write Conflicts
metrics.description: Number of times the operation was retried due to a write conflict.

metrics.label: Physical Data Read Wait
metrics.description: Total wait time for physical data reads from disk.

metrics.label: Physical Index Read Wait
metrics.description: Total wait time for physical index reads from disk.

metrics.label: Physical Write Wait
metrics.description: Total wait time for physical writes to disk (WiredTiger journal/data).

metrics.label: WiredTiger Cache Stall
metrics.description: Wait time induced by WiredTiger cache pressure (waiting for dirty data eviction).

metrics.label: Oplog Slot Wait
metrics.description: Time waiting for a global oplog slot (write concurrency).

metrics.label: Write Concern Wait
metrics.description: Time spent waiting for acknowledgement from secondaries.

metrics.label: Replication Throttling
metrics.description: Replication backpressure gate. Signal: Primary slowing writes to let secondaries catch up.

metrics.label: Planning Time (µs)
metrics.description: Time spent by the query optimizer to find an ideal execution plan.

metrics.label: Remote Op Wait
metrics.description: Time waiting for results from other shards or remote nodes.

metrics.label: Raw Execution (ms)
metrics.description: Raw time spent inside the execution loop.

metrics.label: Ticket Queue
metrics.description: Pre-execution admission control. Time spent waiting for an execution ticket. Signal: Global concurrency saturation.

metrics.label: Lock Contention
metrics.description: During-execution acquisition wait. Time spent waiting for Global, DB, or Collection locks. Signal: High-velocity contention.

metrics.label: Lock Yields
metrics.description: Number of times the operation yielded its locks to other threads.

metrics.label: Execution Stages
metrics.description: Number of work stages in the query execution plan.

metrics.label: CPU Time (ns)
metrics.description: Exact CPU cycles consumed by the operation (if instrumented).

metrics.label: Time Active (µs)
metrics.description: Total time the transaction was actively processing.

metrics.label: Time Inactive (µs)
metrics.description: Time the transaction was held open while idle.

metrics.label: Read Conflict Wait
metrics.description: Time spent waiting for a consistent snapshot of the data.

metrics.label: Scan Efficiency
metrics.description: Measures how many documents were scanned to find one result. > 1000 signals poor index usage.

metrics.label: Index Selectivity
metrics.description: Measures index cardinality. High ratios indicate the index is not specific enough for the query.

metrics.label: Fetch Amplification
metrics.description: Ratio of document scans to index scans. Higher values indicate 'Large Document' fetches vs index coverage.

metrics.label: Workload Amplification
metrics.description: Measures index maintenance cost. Calculated as: (keysInserted+Deleted+Updated) / (ninserted+Modified+deleted+upserted). > 10x signals over-indexing.
